title: PlanetaryLedgerEvent
description: An immutable record in the NEXUS Planetary Ledger — the append-only log of all governance decisions, containment actions, stage transitions, contract executions, and payment events across the GAIA network. Every ledger record MUST conform to this schema.

ledger_id.description: UUID4 unique identifier for this ledger record.

record_type.description: Type of ledger record. Each type corresponds to a high-stakes NEXUS operation that requires permanent, tamper-evident recording.

issuer.description: EID or identifier of the GAIA node or human that created this record (e.g., 'dtn://gaia/founder/', 'governance:policy-uuid').

subject.description: Optional EID or identifier of the entity this record concerns (e.g., a being, node, or contract party).

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of record creation.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the serialised 'content' field. Used to verify record integrity.

previous_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the previous ledger record in the chain (for Merkle-chain integrity). Omitted for the genesis record.

authorizer_ids.description: EIDs of all parties who authorised this record. Must meet the minimum authorizer count for the record_type per GOVERNANCE.md.

jurisdiction.description: Optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code or 'GAIA' for GAIA Sovereign Arbitration Tribunal jurisdiction.

content.description: The substantive content of the ledger record. Structure varies by record_type.

tags.description: Optional free-form tags for querying and filtering the ledger.
